description: One-time rig setup for a2A1920-160umPRO arena tracking. Run test_one_time_setup after mounting the camera or changing lens/lighting.
manual_steps: Run Basler pylon Viewer Automatic Image Adjustment under real arena lighting; note exposure/gain for sweep ranges.
Run Flat-Field Correction wizard in pylon Viewer (important with 4 mm wide-angle lens).
Confirm arena is centered in the AOI; adjust offset_x/offset_y in camera_config.json if needed.
Tape-measure GSD at the production mount height before locking values.
After this tool passes, copy the reported camera block into src/camera_config.json.
